requirements.summary: Add a dedicated app download page with platform-specific download buttons matching Mediatube's dark theme
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated download page or modal is accessible from the main navigation or landing area
Download buttons are clearly labeled by platform (e.g., Android, iOS)
The page/section matches the existing Mediatube dark theme and design language
The download section is responsive and renders correctly on both mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Create a new download page component that displays the generated promotional banner (frontend/public/assets/generated/download-banner.dim_1200x400.png), platform-specific download buttons for Android APK and iOS with appropriate icons (using lucide-react icons), download instructions, and app feature highlights. The page must use the existing dark theme tokens from index.css and tailwind.config.js (bg-youtube-black, text-white, accent colors). Include responsive layout with centered content, hero section with the banner image, download button cards with platform icons and labels, and app benefits section. Ensure mobile-first responsive design that works on both mobile and desktop viewports.

Register a new route for the download page at path '/download' that renders the DownloadAppPage component. Add the route definition within the existing TanStack Router configuration alongside other page routes like HomePage, VideoPlayerPage, etc.

Add a 'Download App' navigation link in the sidebar navigation menu that routes to '/download'. Place it logically within the existing navigation items (e.g., after 'Community' or before footer links). Use the Download or Smartphone icon from lucide-react. Ensure the link is visible in both desktop sidebar and mobile bottom navigation if appropriate, maintaining consistent styling with other nav items.

Add translation keys for the download page in all supported languages (at least English and Spanish). Include keys for: 'downloadApp' (nav link label), 'downloadAppTitle', 'downloadAppSubtitle', 'downloadForAndroid', 'downloadForIOS', 'appFeatures', and feature descriptions. Follow the existing translation structure and naming conventions in the file.
